name: Infantry
flavor: Italian-edition card name: FANTERIA. Both rank sides are verified against physical-card photos in originals/ (photo_2026-06-02_09-56-47.jpg = New Recruit, photo_2026-06-02_09-56-52.jpg = Super Soldiers): Def 2 / Tough 5; special action RICOGNIZIONE ('Posiziona fino a 2 sugli avversari' = place up to 2 Scout tokens on opponents); Super Soldiers per-⚡ ability 'Effettua 1 Movimento dopo questo Attacco' (make 1 Move after this Attack); MOVE-side universal heal 'Rimuovi 1 ♥ da questo Soldatino' (remove 1 Heart from this Little Soldier).

specialAction.name: Scout
specialAction.summary: Place up to 2 Scout tokens on your opponents' Little Soldiers. They do not need to be valid targets. These tokens reduce their defense.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning rolled, make 1 Move after this Attack.
